speaker: speaker1
text: All right . I want to bring everybody back on this subject . When can we start working on this ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , we could probably get started with a preparatory meeting this afternoon at 2:00 .

speaker: speaker1
text: I tell you what , 2:00 is not available for me , but you can get started and I'll come by at around 3:00

speaker: speaker2
text: That's fine with me . How much time are we going to have to work on this ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Perhaps one year , I'm not sure .
